SEARCH
Package model.course

Class Mark

java.lang.Object
model.course.Mark
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Mark extends Object implements Serializable
Assessment result for one student in one course.

The total grade is calculated from first attestation, second attestation, and final exam scores.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Mark

      public Mark(String courseName, String studentId, Double firstAtt, Double secondAtt, Double finalGrade)
      Creates a mark and calculates the total grade.
      Parameters:
      courseName - course title
      studentId - student identifier
      firstAtt - first attestation score
      secondAtt - second attestation score
      finalGrade - final exam score

  • Method Details

    • isPassed

      public boolean isPassed()
      Checks whether the student passed the course.
      Returns:
      true when total grade is at least 50

    • convertToLetter

      public String convertToLetter()
      Converts the numeric total grade to a letter grade.
      Returns:
      letter grade according to the university scale

    • convertToGPA

      public String convertToGPA()
      Converts the numeric total grade to a GPA value.
      Returns:
      GPA value formatted as text
